corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

aggregation.method: exact-input reuse of the current Goal and public terminals plus one corrected recovery input and one twelve-case final-package batch
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

candidate.source_identity_note: clean final-package revision before the twelve-case batch; earlier selected Goal and recovery receipts bind the same package and their exact current case inputs
candidate.selection_note: Twelve cases are first terminals on the final package; Goal is its first terminal after the final Skill guard; recovery is its first terminal after the final bounded Oracle correction.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both receipts are the first terminal results for the exact final public-0.2 inputs and preserve the false-completion and review-quota false-stall contrast.

invalidated_attempts.reason: the final Goal-stop Runtime changed the candidate package
the final Goal-stop Runtime changed the candidate package
the final Goal-stop Runtime changed the candidate package
the final Goal-stop Runtime and bounded recovery Oracle changed its bound input
the final Goal-stop Runtime changed the candidate package
the prominent Goal guard and bounded recovery Oracle changed its bound input
the prominent Goal guard changed the candidate package
the bounded lost-scout and dirty-scope Oracle corrections changed this case input
the bounded dirty-scope Oracle correction changed this case input

known_interrupted_batches.stage: during the next model execution before a terminal case receipt
known_interrupted_batches.reason: Root stopped the batch after the two material failures; its five terminal cases are independently retained as invalidated attempts
